sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n8716" key="a)nqemo/strwtos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀνθεμό-στρωτος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n8716.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">strewn with flowers,</tr_> Id. ap. <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg4040.tlg029:p.138R" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Phot.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">p.138R.</biblScope> </bibl> </sense> </entryFree>
